name: Solana Whale Copy Agent
description: Copy-follow template for selected Solana whale wallets with allowlists, max pain, slippage caps, copied lots, and user-owned wallet signing.
degenPitch: Follow whale flow with brakes, not blind worship.
whatItDoes: Tracks selected whale wallets and source actions.
Applies allowlists, blocked tokens, max trade, daily loss, and slippage rules.
Creates copied lots and alpha fee accruals only after positive finalized PnL.
cursorPrompt: Build a Solana Whale Copy Agent with DNA x402. Track allowlisted wallets, block unsafe mints, enforce max pain and slippage, create copied lots, and charge alpha fees only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL with consent.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Solana Whale Copy Agent with DNA x402. Track allowlisted wallets, block unsafe mints, enforce max pain and slippage, create copied lots, and charge alpha fees only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL with consent.
exampleFlow: Copied lot opens after signature or gate
PnL finalization creates fee only if positive
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds source wallet and copied lot.
Fee bps locks at copied-lot entry.
No backend signs the whale-copy action.
